flavourText: Lurks in every equation, shifting forms with every operation. Solve for x before it solves for you.

dialogue.intro: I hide in every equation, shifting form with each operation. Can you solve for me?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the laws of indices and the rules of surds. Begin.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Rules are just the start. Apply them to composite and inverse functions.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final variable. Write a complete algebraic argument.
dialogue.lowHp: My domain is shrinking to nothing!
dialogue.defeated: You have solved every equation. The unknown is known.
dialogue.survived: Too many algebraic errors. Simplify your approach and return.

flavourText: A towering polynomial monstrosity. Factor it down piece by piece or be crushed by its complexity.

dialogue.intro: I am a polynomial of the highest degree. Can you factor me down to nothing?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the factor theorem and the remainder theorem.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Theorems are tools. Use them to find my roots.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final factorisation. Fully analyse this polynomial.
damageTaken: You have found one of my roots!
dialogue.lowHp: I am down to a linear factor!
dialogue.survived: You missed a factor. My roots remain hidden in the complex plane.

flavourText: Roams the plane, drawing circles of destruction. Plot your approach carefully or lose your bearings.

dialogue.intro: I roam the Cartesian plane freely. Can you pin down my coordinates?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the equations of lines and circles. Midpoints, gradients, distances.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Equations are just lines on paper. Apply them to find intersections.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final coordinate. Prove your geometric reasoning.
dialogue.defeated: You have mapped every point. The plane is yours.
dialogue.survived: Your coordinates were off. Recalibrate and plot again.

flavourText: Summons an endless army, each soldier stronger than the last. Find the pattern before you are overwhelmed.

dialogue.intro: My army is infinite, each term larger than the last. Can you find the sum before I overwhelm you?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the formulae for arithmetic and geometric series.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Formulae are memorised. Now use them to find sums and prove convergence.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final term. Write a complete series analysis with proof.
damageTaken: You have found my common ratio!
That sum to infinity was correct!
My sequence is converging on defeat!
dialogue.lowHp: My series is converging to zero!
dialogue.defeated: Summed to infinity and beyond. You have counted every term.
dialogue.survived: Your series diverged. Find the pattern and try again.

flavourText: Coils through all four quadrants. Only those who master every identity can break its cycle.

dialogue.intro: I coil through every quadrant, cycling endlessly. Can you break my periodic pattern?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the key trigonometric identities and exact values.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Identities are just the start. Solve equations across all four quadrants.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final cycle. Prove a trigonometric identity and solve completely.
damageTaken: You have found all my solutions!
dialogue.lowHp: My period is shrinking to nothing!
dialogue.defeated: Every solution found in every quadrant. Trigonometric mastery.
dialogue.survived: You missed solutions in the other quadrants. Think in full cycles.

flavourText: Grows exponentially stronger each turn. Use logarithms to cut it down to size.

dialogue.intro: I grow exponentially with every turn. Only logarithms can cut me down.
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the laws of logarithms. Define the natural logarithm.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Laws are just tools. Use them to solve exponential equations.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final growth model. Analyse exponential change completely.
dialogue.defeated: Reduced to ln(0). You have logged my defeat.
dialogue.survived: Your logarithmic skills were undefined. Strengthen your base and return.

flavourText: Haunts every curve, hiding at stationary points. Find its rate of change before it vanishes.

dialogue.intro: I haunt every curve, lurking at stationary points. Can you find my gradient?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the rules of differentiation. Power rule, chain rule, product rule.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Rules are mechanical. Apply them to find and classify turning points.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final derivative. Write a complete optimisation problem.
damageTaken: You have found my stationary point!
dialogue.lowHp: I am at a point of inflection... nowhere to turn!
dialogue.defeated: Every turning point found and classified. Rate of change mastered.
dialogue.survived: You differentiated incorrectly. Check your chain rule and return.

flavourText: Vast and formless, it fills the space beneath every curve. Sum its parts to reveal its weakness.

dialogue.intro: I fill the space beneath every curve. Can you calculate my area?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the rules of integration. Reverse the differentiation.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Rules are one thing. Apply definite integration to find areas.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final integral. Calculate a complex area between curves.
dialogue.defeated: Every area calculated. The space beneath me is claimed.
dialogue.survived: You forgot the constant of integration. A classic mistake. Return prepared.

flavourText: Never gives an exact answer, only closer and closer approximations. Converge on its weakness before it diverges into chaos.

dialogue.intro: I never give exact answers, only approximations. Can you converge on my weakness?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define the Newton-Raphson method and the change of sign rule.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Definitions are approximate. Apply iterative methods to find roots.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final iteration. Compare methods and analyse convergence.
damageTaken: That change of sign was decisive!
dialogue.defeated: Converged to the exact solution. Numerical precision achieved.
dialogue.survived: Your iterations diverged. Choose a better starting value and return.

flavourText: Strikes from any angle in three dimensions. You must resolve its forces to find the path to victory.

dialogue.intro: I strike from any direction in three dimensions. Can you resolve my components?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define position vectors, direction vectors and the scalar product.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Definitions point the way. Use vectors to find angles and intersections.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final dimension. Solve a complete 3D vector problem.
dialogue.lowHp: My resultant is approaching the zero vector!
dialogue.defeated: Every component resolved. You have conquered all three dimensions.
dialogue.survived: Your vectors pointed in the wrong direction. Recalculate and return.

flavourText: Gathers data from every corner, but its methods are riddled with bias. Expose its flawed sampling to defeat it.

dialogue.intro: I gather data from everywhere, but my methods are flawed. Can you spot the bias?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the types of sampling. Define their advantages and limitations.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Types are textbook. Identify the bias in real scenarios.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final sample. Design and critique a complete sampling strategy.
damageTaken: You have exposed my sampling bias!
My sample is no longer representative!
dialogue.defeated: Every bias exposed. Your sampling is impeccable.
dialogue.survived: Your sample was not representative. Widen your frame and return.

flavourText: Sprouts a new head for every class interval. Read its frequency density correctly or be lost in the bars.

dialogue.intro: I sprout a new head for every class interval. Can you read my frequency density?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define frequency density. Explain how histograms differ from bar charts.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Definitions are drawn. Interpret real histograms and cumulative frequency diagrams.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final class interval. Analyse a complete dataset with appropriate diagrams.
damageTaken: You have read my frequency density!
That cumulative frequency was spot on!
dialogue.lowHp: My bars are shrinking to nothing!
dialogue.defeated: Every interval accounted for. Data presentation mastered.
dialogue.survived: You confused frequency with frequency density. A common trap. Return prepared.

flavourText: Claims to know every outcome. Untangle its conditions and prove that nothing is certain.

dialogue.intro: I predict every outcome with perfect probability. Can you prove me wrong?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the addition and multiplication rules. Define independence.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Rules are just axioms. Apply conditional probability to real problems.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final outcome. Write a complete probability analysis with tree diagrams.
damageTaken: You have found the correct probability!
dialogue.lowHp: The probability of my survival approaches zero!
dialogue.survived: You confused mutually exclusive with independent. A critical error. Return.

flavourText: Hides within the normal distribution, perfectly symmetric and deadly. Standardise your attack to find its z-value weakness.

dialogue.intro: I hide within the normal curve, perfectly symmetric. Can you standardise your attack?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define the binomial and normal distributions. State their parameters.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Parameters are set. Calculate probabilities using the distributions.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final z-value. Model a complete statistical scenario.
dialogue.lowHp: I am three standard deviations from defeat!
dialogue.defeated: Perfectly standardised. The bell curve rings for you.
dialogue.survived: Your z-value was incorrect. Check your standardisation and return.

flavourText: Insists there is no effect, no difference, no hope. Gather sufficient evidence to reject its claim.

dialogue.intro: I insist there is no significant effect. Gather evidence to reject me.
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define the null and alternative hypotheses. What is a significance level?
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Definitions are hypothetical. Conduct a full hypothesis test.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final test. Write a complete hypothesis test with full conclusion.
damageTaken: That p-value was in the critical region!
You have rejected my null hypothesis!
dialogue.lowHp: The evidence against me is overwhelming!
dialogue.defeated: Null hypothesis rejected at all significance levels. Statistical proof.
dialogue.survived: Insufficient evidence to reject me. Your sample size was too small.

flavourText: Accelerates relentlessly, launching projectiles from every direction. Calculate its trajectory before impact.

dialogue.intro: I accelerate relentlessly towards you. Can you calculate my trajectory?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the suvat equations. Define displacement, velocity, acceleration.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Equations are just letters. Apply them to projectile motion.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final projectile. Model a complete kinematic scenario.
dialogue.lowHp: I am decelerating to a halt!
dialogue.defeated: Trajectory fully calculated. You have stopped me in my tracks.
dialogue.survived: You mixed up your suvat variables. Check your equations of motion.

flavourText: Drags you down inclined planes and tangles you in pulleys. Resolve every force or be pulled apart.

dialogue.intro: I drag everything down inclined planes. Can you resolve my forces?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State Newton's three laws. Define weight, friction, normal reaction.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Laws are stated. Resolve forces on inclined planes and connected particles.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final force diagram. Write a complete mechanics analysis.
damageTaken: That free body diagram was perfect!
dialogue.lowHp: I am in equilibrium... I cannot accelerate!
dialogue.defeated: Every force resolved. Newton would be proud.
dialogue.survived: You forgot to resolve perpendicular to the plane. A fundamental error.

flavourText: Balances on a knife-edge, waiting for you to miscalculate. One wrong pivot and it all comes crashing down.

dialogue.intro: I balance on a knife-edge. One wrong calculation and everything topples.
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define moments. State the principle of moments and conditions for equilibrium.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Principles are balanced. Apply them to beams and non-uniform rods.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final pivot. Solve a complete equilibrium problem.
damageTaken: You have found my pivot point!
dialogue.lowHp: I am tilting... about to topple!
dialogue.defeated: Perfectly balanced, then perfectly toppled. Equilibrium mastered.
dialogue.survived: You took moments about the wrong point. Choose your pivot carefully.
